lines.english: The jewel of spiritual wisdom is awakened deep within.
Evil-mindedness is eradicated, and the supreme status is attained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਲਾਇ ਲਏ ਸੋ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no laae le so laagai |
lines.english: He alone is attached, whom the Lord Himself attaches.
Pressing my palms together, I offer my prayer;
By Guru's Grace, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||3||
if it pleases You, Lord, please bless me and fulfill me.
Servant Nanak meditates on God forever. ||4||2||
Grant Your Mercy, Lord, and bless me with devotion.
She obeys the Hukam of His Order, and abandons her self-conceit.
Blessed is that soul-bride, who realizes God.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
Imbued with her Beloved, she celebrates in delight. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅਰਪਿ ਤਜਿ ਲਾਜ ਲੋਕਾਨੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man tan arap taj laaj lokaanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Dedicate your mind and body to Him; stop living to please others. ||1||Pause||
Listen, O my companions - these are the signs on the Path to meet God.
One who is in the grip of pride does not obtain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.
to do only that which pleases God.
Such a soul-bride merges into the Being of God. ||2||
One soul-bride counsels another,
She regrets and repents, when her life-night passes away.
The unfortunate self-willed manmukhs suffer in pain. ||3||
I pray to God, but I think that He is far away.
Servant Nanak sings of Him; I see Him Ever-present everywhere. ||4||3||
God is imperishable and eternal; He is pervading and permeating everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਵਸਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਕੀਨਾ ਹਉ ਘਰ ਕੀ ਨਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: grihu vas gur keenaa hau ghar kee naar |
lines.english: The Giver has put this household of my being under my own control. I am now the mistress of the Lord's Home.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
My Husband Lord has made the ten senses and organs of actions my slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਸਮਗ੍ਰੀ ਮੈ ਘਰ ਕੀ ਜੋੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: sagal samagree mai ghar kee jorree |
lines.english: I have gathered together all the faculties and facilities of this house.
I am thirsty with desire and longing for my Husband Lord. ||1||
What Glorious Virtues of my Beloved Husband Lord should I describe?
He is All-knowing, totally beautiful and merciful; He is the Destroyer of ego. ||1||Pause||
I am adorned with Truth, and I have applied the mascara of the Fear of God to my eyes.
I have chewed the betel-leaf of the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਸਭ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵੈ ਜਾਂ ਪਿਰੁ ਘਰਿ ਆਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dhan sabh sukh paavai jaan pir ghar aavai |2|
lines.english: The soul-bride becomes totally happy, when her Husband Lord comes to her home. ||2||
By the charms of virtue, I have enticed and fascinated my Husband Lord.
My bracelets, robes and ornaments beautifully adorn me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਤਿਆਗੀ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਮੇਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabh kaaman tiaagee priau preetam meraa |3|
lines.english: Renouncing all other brides, my Beloved has become my lover. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਸਿ ਕਰਿ ਲੀਨਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: vas kar leenaa gur bharam chukaaeaa |
lines.english: He is under my power - the Guru has dispelled my doubts.
My mansion is lofty and elevated.
I have prepared my bed with infinite care and faith.
The sun has risen, and its light shines brightly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਿਰ ਧਨ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: jan naanak pir dhan mil sukh paaeaa |4|4|
lines.english: O Servant Nanak, my Husband Lord has come; the soul-bride has found peace. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵ ਰੰਗ ਲਾਲੁ ਸੇਜ ਰਾਵਣ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nav rang laal sej raavan aaeaa |
lines.english: My Darling Beloved is new and fresh; He has come to my bed to enjoy me.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
I have gone out searching to find my Beloved Husband Lord.
An intense yearning to meet God has welled up in my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਤ ਸਦੇਸਰੋ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਸੇਜ ਵਿਛਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sunat sadesaro pria grihi sej vichhaaee |
lines.english: Hearing news of my Beloved, I have laid out my bed in my home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਆਇਓ ਤਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhram bhram aaeo tau nadar na paaee |1|
lines.english: Wandering, wandering all around, I came, but I did not even see Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੁ ਸਾਜਨ ਹਉ ਤੁਝੁ ਕੁਰਬਾਨੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mil saajan hau tujh kurabaano |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Come and meet me, O Friend; I am a sacrifice to You. ||1||Pause||
How can this poor heart be comforted?
The bride is asleep, while her Husband Lord is always awake.
The bride is intoxicated, as if she has drunk wine.
One bed is spread out for the bride and her Husband Lord.
She has lost hope - so many days have passed.
The soul-bride only awakens when her Husband Lord calls to her. ||2||
I have travelled through all the lands and the countries.
